title: Uruguayan Fried Chicken and Rice
description: A flavorful and spicy Uruguayan-inspired fried chicken dish served with a side of savory rice.
instructions: Preheat oil in a large skillet to 375°F (190°C).
In a separate bowl, mix together paprika, brown sugar, and cumin.
Dredge chicken drumsticks in the spice mixture, shaking off excess.
Carefully place the coated chicken in the preheated oil and fry for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove the fried chicken from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Serve the fried chicken with a side of cooked rice and your choice of sides.
Optional: garnish with chopped fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro.
